svg.text: Requirement fitment engine for D365 F&O

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the ingestion agent in REQFIT')
sendPrompt('What does the normalizer do in REQFIT?')
sendPrompt('How does REQFIT use the D365 knowledge base?')
sendPrompt('What role do Microsoft docs play in fitment?')
sendPrompt('How do past fitments help new analysis?')
sendPrompt('How does embedding similarity work in fitment?')
sendPrompt('What are candidate features in REQFIT?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM classify FIT requirements?')
sendPrompt('When is a requirement classified as PARTIAL FIT?')
sendPrompt('What happens when REQFIT identifies a GAP?')
sendPrompt('How does the rationale generator work?')
sendPrompt('How does human-in-the-loop work in REQFIT?')
sendPrompt('What consistency checks does REQFIT run?')
sendPrompt('What does the final fitment report contain?')
sendPrompt('How does REQFIT connect to FDD generation?')
g.text: Feeds into FDD FOR FITS / FDD FOR GAPS
